news.t: AVANTIS INVESTORS LAUNCHES FOUR NEW ACTIVE ETFS

overview.description: The Avantis Moderate Allocation ETF (AVMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target risk asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed, asset allocation fund-of-funds that invests with moderate risk in a broad basket of equity and fixed income ETFs. AVMA was launched on Jun 27, 2023 and is issued by American Century Investments.
